description: Index of benchmark technical pre-check profiles and templates used by historical and provider-backed benchmark executions.
selectionRules: Use TC_C0_HISTORICAL_FIXED_CLUSTER only for the historical fixed-cluster characterization workflow.
Use TC_C1_PROVIDER_BACKED_BASELINE for the official C1 provider-backed baseline cycle.
Use TC_PROVIDER_BACKED_PRECHECK_TEMPLATE only as a runtime generation template for provider-backed campaign variants.
Do not use a concrete historical profile as a template for provider-backed variants.
